headline: Trade Desk Board Shakeup Highlights AI Push And Valuation Questions
summary: Director Gokul Rajaram has resigned from The Trade Desk's (NasdaqGM:TTD) board of directors. The departure comes after a period of busy corporate activity, including a high profile ad partnership with OpenAI. Recent insider activity has included major share purchases by the CEO, adding another governance angle for investors to watch. The Trade Desk runs a digital advertising platform that helps advertisers buy and manage ad campaigns across formats and channels. The company has been tying...
